response.justification: The candidate meets the raw tenure bar with roughly 19 years of hands-on software development and shows genuine breadth (web, mobile, embedded, low-latency systems) plus entrepreneurial experience founding an open-source geo-data platform. However, the role is a director-level principal position centered on AI strategy, and the resume shows a senior/staff-level trajectory with only recent, tooling-level AI exposure (MCP generators, agent infrastructure since 2025) — no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products or platforms, and no evidence of organization-level technical leadership, strategic advisory work, or influence at the scope this role demands.
strengths: 19+ years of broad, hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Founder experience with a long-running open-source platform, plus public talks and workshops
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
concerns: Seniority mismatch: senior/staff IC background versus a director-level principal role
No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products/platforms as the role prefers
Little evidence of strategic leadership, executive-level advisory, or large-scale cloud platform strategy

key_factors.factor: Limited AI depth and track record
Long, broad engineering tenure with founder experience
